compiled_state.title: RED test: Create test-update-artifacts.sh with merge scenario tests
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-update-artifacts.sh with test functions covering all merge strategies, conflict handling, and platform detection for the dso update-artifacts command. All tests FAIL (RED) until the merge lib and orchestrator are implemented.

### Test functions:
- test_update_config_appends_new_keys: run merge_config_file with a host config missing keys from plugin template → assert new keys appended, existing keys unchanged
- test_update_config_commented_key_treated_as_present: host config has `# some_key=val` → assert merge does NOT re-add some_key
- test_update_config_reserved_metadata_updated: host has old # dso-version:, plugin has new → assert stamp updated to new version
- test_update_ci_workflow_merge: run merge_ci_workflow with host CI and plugin CI → assert plugin sections merged
- test_update_ci_fallback_no_pyyaml: run merge_ci_workflow without PyYAML → assert fallback awk path produces valid output
- test_update_precommit_reuses_merge: run pre-commit merge via shared lib → assert DSO hooks added
- test_update_shim_overwrite: run update on stale shim → assert shim replaced with current version
- test_update_conflict_exit_code_2: create unresolvable merge → assert exit code 2
- test_update_conflict_json_valid: verify JSON stdout on conflict: artifact, conflict_ours, conflict_theirs fields present
- test_update_conflict_base64_decodable: verify base64 fields are decodable back to original content
- test_update_stamps_updated_after_success: after successful update, verify version stamps match current plugin version
- test_update_platform_base64_flag: verify platform detection returns -w 0 on Linux, -b 0 on macOS

### Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: isolated temp directory with stamped artifacts at an older version, plus plugin reference files at current version
- When: update-artifacts.sh (or individual merge functions) are invoked
- Then: artifacts are updated with correct merge strategy, stamps are current, or conflict JSON is emitted

### Fuzzy match note
Source: update-artifacts.sh → normalized: updateartifactssh
Test: test-update-artifacts.sh → normalized: testupdateartifactssh
Fuzzy match PASSES (updateartifactssh is substring of testupdateartifactssh)

Source: artifact-merge-lib.sh → NOT fuzzy-matchable to test-update-artifacts.sh
→ .test-index entry REQUIRED for artifact-merge-lib.sh

### Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-update-artifacts.sh

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| tests/scripts/test-update-artifacts.sh | create |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — RED-marked tests tolerated
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-update-artifacts.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 12 test functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_update_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-update-artifacts.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 12)}'
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED markers for each test function
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_update_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] `.test-index` entry maps artifact-merge-lib.sh to test-update-artifacts.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'artifact-merge-lib' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-update-artifacts.sh, .test-index. Tests: RED (22 failures, all expected).
comments.author: Test
